explanation: Creating a post returns the full post object with generated id and timestamps. Status: 201 Created.
Fetching a post by ID returns the complete post object. Status: 200 OK.
Requesting a non-existent post returns a 404 error with descriptive message.
Updating a post changes only the specified fields and updates the updatedAt timestamp. Status: 200 OK.

output: { "error": "Invalid post data", "statusCode": 400, "details": ["Title is required and must be 1-200 characters", "Author is required"] }
explanation: Missing required fields return a 400 error with details about what is missing.
List endpoint returns paginated results with metadata about total count and pages.
Successful deletion returns status 204 No Content with no response body.
Adding a comment to a post returns the comment with generated id and timestamp. Status: 201 Created.
Listing comments returns all comments for the specified post.
Filtering posts by author returns only posts from that author with correct pagination.
